NASA Exoplanet Archive

Source: data/nexsci_pscomppars.csv (Composite Planetary Systems, one row per confirmed planet) — 6,324 planets · 413 whose host is in muscat-db (★ markers) · 557 with HARPS RVBank data · 215 in JWST Atmospheric Observation List (NExoList) · 286 with time-series spectra. Click a point to open its muscat-db target page, or — if the host is not in muscat-db — its NASA Exoplanet Archive overview. · catalog file updated 2026-07-17.

Planet type OR: Jupiter-size Neptune-size Sub-Neptune Super-Earth Earth-size
Host star OR: M dwarf K type G type F type A / hotter
Multiplicity AND: Binary Tertiary+ Circumbinary
System AND: Young (<1 Gyr) Nearby (<100 pc) Bright (G<12) Has TTV Has obliquity
Observability AND / OR: depth > 1ppt Tmag < 12 Dec > 0 Dec < 0
External data AND: has HARPS RV has JWST data has time-series spectra
